problem: R/H BAFFLE MISSING RIVET ON AFT SUPPORT BRACKET.
action: REMOVED BAFFLE, REPAIRED BRACKET & STRIPPED OIL COOLER BOLT. OIL COOLER LINES & OIL PRESSURE LNIE REMOVED FOR MX. #3 CYL DRAIN LINE DISCONNECTED FOR MX. RECONNECTED LINES, INSTALLED BAFFLES & COOLER.

problem: #3 CYL BAFFLE BRACKET RIVETS ARE LOOSE ON BACK SIDE OF BAFFLE.
action: REMOVED BAFFLE, REINSTALLED BRACKET. REINSTALLED BAFFLE. RECONNECTED UPPER OIL COOLER LINE, OIL TRANSDUCER LINE, #3 OIL RETURN LINE. INSTALLED NEW NUTPLATE & BOLT ON OIL COOLER.

problem: BAFFLE CRACKED AT LOWER LEFT BOLT OF OIL COOLER.
CRACK NOTED ON ENGINE BAFFLE NEAR AFT ALTERNATOR ATTACH BOLT.
BOLT MISSING ON #3 CYL SIDE BAFFLE.
FRONT FWD BAFFLE HUNG UP ON BOLT OF ALTERNATOR EXTRA BRACKET.
BAFFLE BOLT OR SCREW MISSING, FWD L/H SIDE IN FRONT OF #2 CYL.
CRACK ON FWD BAFFLE, AFT OF ALTERNATOR MOUNT BOLT.
#2 CYL SIDE BAFFLE MISSING BOLT.
action: INSTALLED BOLT IN #2 CYL SIDE BAFFLE.

problem: #3 ENGINE BAFFLE BOLT HOLE, FOR HOLD DOWN, NEEDS NEW RIVETS.
#3 CYL AFT BAFFLE MISSING MOUNT BOLT.
#4 L/H BAFFLE MISSING BOLT.
L/H AFT ENGINE BAFFLE ATTACHMENT BOLT MISSING.
R/H ENGINE #2 CYL BAFFLE BOLT MISSING.
Engine L/H aft baffle mounting bolt missing
Aft #3 cylinder baffle bolt seized
action: Removed baffle from cylinder 3, extract bolt, run tap into cylinder baffle bolt hole, installed baffle and new bolt.

problem: RH ENGINE BAFFLE BOLT MISSING.
action: INSPECTED COWLING AND COULD NOT LOCATE. INSTALLED NEW BOLT.

problem: LH eng #3 baffle cracked near baffle attach bolt
action: Fabricated and installed doubler out of 0.040 5052-H32 and riveted IAW AC43.13 1B Chap 4-57

problem: cyl #1 baffle bolt broken in bolt hole
action: extracted broken bolt from cyl #1 baffle attachment bolts, used a thread chaser to clean damaged threads, installed new bolt in cyl #1 baffle bolt hole

problem: CYL #3 Side Baffle Cracked at Bolt Hole
action: stop drilled crack in #3 side baffle. fabricated patch of .063 5052 aluminum. riveted patch IAW AC43.13-1b Para. 4-57

problem: TOP ALTERNATOR Z BRACKET BOLT LOOSE ON ENGINE SIDE
action: LOOSENED TOP ALTERNATOR BOLT TO MOVE Z BRACKET OUT OF THE WAY, REMOVED CYL #2 FWD AND SIDE BAFFLE TO GAIN ACCESS, INSPECTED BOLT HOLE, PREPPED BOLT HOLE FOR HELICOIL, INSTALLED HELICOIL, REINSTALLED CYL #2 FWD AND SIDE BAFFLE, MOVED Z BRACKET INTO POSITION, INSTALLED NEW BOLT INTO Z BRACKET ON ENGINE, TIGHTENED ALTERNATOR TOP MOUNT BOLT, SAFETIED

problem: #3 CYL SIDE BAFFLE CRACKED AT REAR BOLT.
action: Fabricated patch for CYL #3 side baffle out of 2024 T3 .040 aluminum and riveted IAW AC 43.13-1B CH 4 Par 4-57. Reinstalled #3 side baffle.

problem: cyl #2 fwd baffle missing bolt.
cyl #2 fwd baffle missing bolt.
LH ENG #3 aft baffle cracked
action: stop drilled double crack around L/H engine cyl #3 baffle and stopped drilled double crack around bolt of aft baffle cyl #3.

problem: L/H FWD ENG BAFFLE BOLT MISSING
action: INSTALLED NEW BOLT IN L/H FWD ENGINE BAFFLE BOLT HOLE.
